channel.title: Boxx Commercial Finance Insights
channel.description: Commercial finance insights and funding intelligence for UK business owners.

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Commercial Finance in the UK (2026 Edition)
item.description: A comprehensive 2026 guide to commercial finance in the UK covering business loans, commercial mortgages, development finance, bridging loans, asset finance and how to structure funding properly.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: Commercial Mortgage Rates UK: What Really Affects the Rate You’re Offered?
item.description: Understand what influences commercial mortgage rates in the UK, how lenders assess risk and how to structure business property finance to secure better terms.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: Commercial Mortgages UK: What Business Owners Should Know Before Applying
item.description: A practical guide to commercial mortgages in the UK. Learn about rates, deposits, lender requirements and how to structure business property finance correctly.
item.author: andrew@boxxfinance.co.uk (Andrew Farrimond)

item.title: How to Get a Business Loan in the UK
item.description: A practical guide explaining how to get a business loan in the UK, what lenders look for, common mistakes to avoid and how to structure funding correctly.
item.author: andrew@boxxfinance.co.uk (Andrew Farrimond)

item.title: Unsecured vs Secured Business Loans: What’s Right for Your Business?
item.description: Understand the difference between unsecured and secured business loans in the UK. Learn which option suits your business, risk profile and growth plans.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: Why “Cheapest Rate” Is the Wrong Way to Choose Business Finance
item.description: Choosing business finance based purely on rate can cost more in the long run. Learn what really matters when structuring commercial funding.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: Why Most UK SMEs Get Funding Timing Wrong (And How to Fix It)
item.description: The biggest mistake UK business owners make isn’t choosing the wrong lender—it’s waiting too long to apply. Learn why the strongest applications are made from a position of strength.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Commercial Loans for SMEs
item.description: A complete guide to commercial loans for UK SMEs — covering loan types, lender assessment criteria, interest rates, and how to choose the right facility for your business.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: Commercial Finance Explained: What Every Business Owner Needs to Know
item.description: A plain-English guide to commercial finance terminology. Understand the key concepts — from LTV and DSCR to facility types — before approaching a lender or broker.
item.author: andrew@boxxfinance.co.uk (Andrew Farrimond)

item.title: How to Secure Commercial Funding with Bad Credit
item.description: A poor credit history doesn't have to end your funding ambitions. Discover the specialist lenders, secured facilities and alternative options available to UK businesses.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: Top 5 Benefits of Invoice Finance for Cash Flow
item.description: Waiting 60–90 days for customer payment? Invoice finance can release up to 90% of outstanding invoice value immediately — improving cash flow without adding debt.
item.author: andrew@boxxfinance.co.uk (Andrew Farrimond)

item.title: Commercial Mortgages vs. Renting: Which is Right for You?
item.description: Should your business lease or buy its trading premises? We compare commercial mortgages and leasing across cost, flexibility, tax efficiency, and long-term business impact.
item.author: andrew@boxxfinance.co.uk (Andrew Farrimond)

item.title: Raising Capital for Growth: Debt vs. Equity
item.description: Should you take a loan or sell shares? We weigh the pros and cons of debt and equity financing for growing UK businesses, focusing on control, cost, and long-term value.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: Understanding Asset Finance: Leasing vs. Hire Purchase
item.description: Need new machinery, vehicles, or tech? Learn how asset finance preserves your cash flow. We compare leasing and hire purchase to help you choose the right structure.
item.author: andrew@boxxfinance.co.uk (Andrew Farrimond)

item.title: How to Secure Development Finance for Property Projects
item.description: New builds, conversions, or major refurbishments? Understanding how lenders assess development risk and structure drawdowns is key to a successful project.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: The Role of Bridging Finance in Business Growth
item.description: When traditional bank loans are too slow, bridging finance provides rapid, short-term capital. Learn when to use the speed of bridging to secure opportunities.
item.author: andrew@boxxfinance.co.uk (Andrew Farrimond)

item.title: Structured Finance: Solving Complex Funding Challenges
item.description: Standard products don't always fit. Structured finance combines multiple facilities to provide a bespoke solution for acquisitions, buyouts, and major growth.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: Working Capital: How to Optimise Your Business Cash Flow
item.description: Working capital is the lifeblood of your business. Learn how to manage your current assets and liabilities to ensure you have the liquid cash needed to grow.
item.author: andrew@boxxfinance.co.uk (Andrew Farrimond)

item.title: Trade Finance: Supporting International and Domestic Supply Chains
item.description: Importing or exporting? Trade finance provides the security and capital needed to manage global supply chains and fulfill large orders with confidence.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: The SME Guide to Tax and VAT Funding
item.description: Don't let tax deadlines drain your growth capital. Learn how structured tax loans spread the cost of VAT, Corporation Tax, and Self-Assessment over 3–12 months.
item.author: andrew@boxxfinance.co.uk (Andrew Farrimond)

item.title: Merchant Cash Advance: Flexible Funding for Retail and Hospitality
item.description: Trading with a card terminal? A Merchant Cash Advance provides capital with repayments that fluctuate with your sales — perfect for seasonal businesses.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)

item.title: How to Prepare for a Commercial Finance Application in the UK
item.description: Learn how to prepare for a commercial finance application in the UK. Improve approval chances with the right documents and funding structure.
item.author: mark@boxxfinance.co.uk (Mark Higgins)
